title: BEM-841 audit Claude auth
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 15:58 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
workflows=[]
for p in sorted(Path('.github/workflows').glob('*.yml')) if Path('.github/workflows').exists() else []:
    txt=read(p)
    if 'claude-code-action' in txt or 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' in txt or 'CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN' in txt:
        workflows.append({'path':str(p),'has_anthropic_secret':'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' in txt,'has_oauth_secret':'CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN' in txt,'has_anthropic_input':'anthropic_api_key:' in txt,'has_oauth_input':'claude_code_oauth_token:' in txt,'preview':txt[:1600]})
needs_patch=[]
for w in workflows:
    if w['has_oauth_secret'] or w['has_oauth_input'] or not w['has_anthropic_input']:
        needs_patch.append(w['path'])
status='claude_auth_workflows_need_patch' if needs_patch else 'claude_auth_workflows_ok'
next_action='patch Claude workflows to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY only' if needs_patch else 'continue smoke triad verification'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'workflows':workflows,'needs_patch':needs_patch,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_audit_claude_auth_workflow.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_audit_claude_auth_workflow.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Audit Claude Auth Workflow | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem841_audit_claude_auth_workflow.json','governance/reports/bem841_audit_claude_auth_workflow.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Audited Claude-related workflows for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY vs CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN usage after BEM-840 auth decision')
"""
No issue comments.
